name: snip
description: Multi-surface token & context optimizer for Claude Code. Hooks Read, Bash, Grep, and Glob and rewrites their output in-flight: edit-safe tree-sitter AST Read across 29 languages, Bash/Grep/Glob output rewriting, recoverable overflow, and net-token honesty. Zero markdown injected, no MCP tools to learn. One native binary, installed and updated through this plugin.
